text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're in the middle of summer camp, and King
Halo has the Kikuka Sho on her mind.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Who will seize glorious victory in the Kikuka Sho?
What's her name?

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Followers
text_block_list.text: King Halo!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho! You couldn't be more correct!
choice_data_list: Shouldn't you be training right now?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
No, no, no, you dummy! This is the part where
you're supposed to say "King is the best!"

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
For the time being, training is secondary! Now is
the moment for making grand impressions!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
With the amount of tourists here, I have to ensure
as many as possible remember my name.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
If I want to run in the likes of the Takarazuka
Kinen or Arima Kinen, I need fans to vote for
me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Logical, but still...

text_block_list.name: Tourist at Food Stall
text_block_list.text:
Ah. Is that the nepo baby everyone's talking
about? Guess you can do whatever you want
when you're rich.

text_block_list.name: Tourist in Swimsuit
text_block_list.text:
That's nepotism for you. I've heard her mom was
seriously amazing, though. At least, that's what
my dad says.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This approach seems counterproductive. It would
be better to show off her actual skills.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Such trifling criticism does nothing to me.
Besides, I'm not going to give—

text_block_list.name: Tourists
text_block_list.text: Ohhhh! Is it who I think it is?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Sei! I finally found you!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well, well, if it isn't Spe! You running from trouble
or what?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
If you're looking for a good fishing spot, the
rocky area down by the coast should be pretty
great.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
No, I'm not here for fishing. I wanted to ask you
to go running with me!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I keep thinking about how well you ran in the
Satsuki Sho!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Love that you get straight to the point. Gives me
protagonist vibes.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But, you're outta luck today! ☆ Why show my
cards when I can just relax instead?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: At least consider it for a second!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Aw, come on!

text_block_list.name: Tourist at Food Stall
text_block_list.text:
Man, I really admire Special Week. She's honest,
upfront, and super determined!

text_block_list.name: Tourist in Swimsuit
text_block_list.text:
Me too, me too! And she's got such good
judgment, observing Seiun Sky.

text_block_list.name: Tourist in Swimsuit
text_block_list.text:
I'm expecting Seiun Sky to turn heads too after
her performance in the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Just one race and those two already have
everyone calling them by their names.
choice_data_list: You want them to be talking about you?
You want them to be talking about you?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Of course. My name should be the talk of the
town.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Instead, everyone keeps going on about "her daughter" and the like. The disrespect is just astonishing, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: King!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: K-Kawakami?! What are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
What's with that question? I'm a student at
Tracen Academy too. It's not weird for me to be
at summer camp.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ugh! That's not what I mean! You're supposed to
be focused on your training!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Exactly! So, why don't you come with me, King?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. I heard you talking just now. You
declared yourself the next winner of the Kikuka
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I wanna train with strong people, the kind who
are full of the confidence to win!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh, Kawakami. You have much to learn.
choice_data_list:
I think it's endearing. You should help out the
younger students.

I think it's endearing. You should help out the
younger students.

Are you prepared to join the call and response
from hell?

Are you prepared to join the call and response
from hell?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh, Kawakami. You have much to learn.
choice_data_list:
I think it's endearing. You should help out the
younger students.

I think it's endearing. You should help out the
younger students.

Are you prepared to join the call and response
from hell?

Are you prepared to join the call and response
from hell?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Umm... She's not younger... You see, sh—

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Okay, King! I'm heading there first! I'm gonna win!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Win?! Against who?! I know you can't mean me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Swept up by Kawakami Princess's challenge, King
Halo joins her for a running session.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sigh... How could you let this happen? Most everyone's already left.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well, I do feel stronger after training, so I'll let it
slide this time. But, starting from tomorrow...
choice_data_list:
We'll go back to promoting the King Halo
brand.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hmph! I'm glad you understand.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well then, I'm going to take a stroll before
heading back to the lodge. You go on without
me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: You're going to make me have to deal with her?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Gulp... Heed the call from hell? Is that your secret training plan?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami... You aren't the sharpest tool in the
shed, are you?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What am I to do with you two? Honestly...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Right, then! If it's what you desire, I'll grant you
the right to join me!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Your job is to shout "King Halo" after everything I
say. Understand?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Okaaay! ♪

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... Wheeze... Well, I think that's about enough promotion for today.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well done, everyone. Best to give your voices a
break before tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well, of course! Once you've joined the troop,
you should stick with it to the very end.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well then, I'm going to take a stroll before
heading back to the lodge. You go on without
me. ...Phew!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fshhh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I have a moment to respond, King Halo
runs away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She dashes off a little slower than usual because
of the sand, but nonetheless swift.

text_block_list.name: Kind Reporter
text_block_list.text: ...Ah, I knew it. She's different from her mother.

text_block_list.name: Kind Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Oh, sorry. I guess I said that out loud. You know, I
used to be a big fan of her mother...

text_block_list.name: Kind Reporter
text_block_list.text:
I heard a rumor that her daughter would be here,
so I couldn't help but come. Hahaha.

text_block_list.name: Kind Reporter
text_block_list.text:
She appears to have good form. However, if it
were her mother...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Why am I already out of breath?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But I can't stop now—not until people
acknowledge me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
The fame, the spotlight, the attention... I'm
nowhere near where I want to be!
